output:
Usage: fab-cli [options] [command]

FaBrary CLI — search Flesh & Blood decks, cards, and tournament events

Options:
  -V, --version     output the version number
  -h, --help        display help for command

Commands:
  fabrary           Deck and card search via fabrary.net
  fabtcg            Official FAB TCG site data (events, organised play)
  rules             Official FAB rules documents (CR, TRP, PPG) vendored in
                    third_party/fab-rules
  lore              Flesh & Blood lore from legendarystories.net (fablore
                    submodule)
  price-comparison  Compare Flesh & Blood single-card prices across TCGplayer
                    and Cardmarket
  help [command]    display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary [options] [command]

Deck and card search via fabrary.net

Options:
  -h, --help            display help for command

Commands:
  auth <token>          Save a raw Cognito access token (advanced — use 'fabrary
                        login' instead)
  login [options]       Log in with your fabrary.net email and password
  heroes [options]      List all heroes with deck counts
  formats               List all formats with deck counts
  search [options]      Search decks by filters
  top [options]         Show top decks ranked by win rate (fetches results for
                        each deck)
  deck [options] <id>   Show deck detail with win rate, card list, matchup
                        guides, and stats
  cards                 Search Flesh & Blood cards
  meta [options]        Show hero win rates from the fabrary.net meta results
                        matrix
  meta-shift [options]  Compare 7d vs 30d win rates to identify trending heroes
  help [command]        display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary auth [options] <token>

Save a raw Cognito access token (advanced — use 'fabrary login' instead)

Options:
  -h, --help  display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary login [options]

Log in with your fabrary.net email and password

Options:
  -u, --username <email>  Your fabrary.net email
  -h, --help              display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary heroes [options]

List all heroes with deck counts

Options:
  -f, --filter <text>  Filter by partial hero name
  -h, --help           display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary formats [options]

List all formats with deck counts

Options:
  -h, --help  display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary search [options]

Search decks by filters

Options:
  --hero <id>             Hero identifier (e.g. prism-awakener-of-sol)
  --format <format>       Format (e.g. "Classic Constructed", CC, Blitz, SA)
  --days <n>              Only decks updated in the last N days
  --has-matchups          Only decks with matchup guides
  --has-results           Only decks with recorded results
  --tournament-only       Only tournament decks
  -q, --query <text>      Text search (deck name, author, hero, card name)
  --latest-search <text>  Alias for --query (matches fabrary.net's Public tab
                          search field / latest_search URL param)
  -n, --limit <n>         Max results (default: 20)
  -p, --page <n>          Page number (0-based) (default: 0)
  -h, --help              display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary top [options]

Show top decks ranked by win rate (fetches results for each deck)

Options:
  --hero <id>        Hero identifier (e.g. prism-awakener-of-sol)
  --format <format>  Format (e.g. "Classic Constructed", CC, Blitz, SA)
  --days <n>         Only decks updated in the last N days
  --min-games <n>    Minimum recorded games (default: 5)
  --source <src>     Filter by source (FaBrary, Talishar)
  --tournament-only  Only tournament decks
  -n, --limit <n>    Max decks to fetch (default: 40)
  --show <n>         Max rows in output (default: 20)
  --per-hero         Show best win-rate and most-games deck per hero
  --top-n <n>        Show top N decks per hero grouped together (implies
                     --per-hero)
  --by-class         Group --top-n output by class (fetches all hero class data)
  --class <name>     Filter by hero class (e.g. Warrior, Ninja, Brute) — uses
                     live card data
  --talent <name>    Filter by hero talent (e.g. Shadow, Light, Ice) — uses live
                     card data
  --young            Include only young hero versions (default: adult only when
                     --class/--talent used)
  --sort <order>     Sort order: winrate (default) or games (default: "winrate")
  -h, --help         display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary deck [options] <id>

Show deck detail with win rate, card list, matchup guides, and stats

Options:
  --source <src>    Filter results by source (FaBrary, Talishar)
  --matchup <name>  Show cards for a specific matchup only (partial name match)
  --decklist-only   Show only the decklist
  --matchups-only   Show only per-matchup card lists
  --stats-only      Show only stats
  -h, --help        display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary cards [options] [command]

Search Flesh & Blood cards

Options:
  -h, --help                  display help for command

Commands:
  local [options] [terms...]  Offline card search over the vendored full card DB (third_party/flesh-and-blood-cards). No auth, no network.
  Searches name + functional text by default; all terms must match (case-insensitive).
  Examples:
    fab-cli fabrary cards local haze bending
    fab-cli fabrary cards local --text "spectral shield"     # cards MENTIONING it in text
    fab-cli fabrary cards local --exact "Spectral Shield"    # the card itself
    fab-cli fabrary cards local --keyword spectra --limit 50
  search [options] <text...>  Search cards by text. Supports inline filters: r:Rarity, t:Type, k:Keyword
    Examples:
      fab-cli fabrary cards search prism awakener
      fab-cli fabrary cards search r:Majestic prism
      fab-cli fabrary cards search vynnset t:Hero
      fab-cli fabrary cards search vynnset --foiling Cold --set Promos
  show <text...>              Show full detail for a specific card (first match)
  help [command]              display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary cards local [options] [terms...]

Offline card search over the vendored full card DB
(third_party/flesh-and-blood-cards). No auth, no network.
Searches name + functional text by default; all terms must match
(case-insensitive).
Examples:
  fab-cli fabrary cards local haze bending
  fab-cli fabrary cards local --text "spectral shield"     # cards MENTIONING it
in text
  fab-cli fabrary cards local --exact "Spectral Shield"    # the card itself
  fab-cli fabrary cards local --keyword spectra --limit 50

Options:
  --name          match card names only
  --text          match functional text only
  --keyword       match card/granted keywords only
  --exact <name>  exact (case-insensitive) name match
  --pitch <n>     filter by pitch value
  --cost <n>      filter by cost
  --type <type>   filter by type/subtype/class (exact word, e.g. Aura, Ninja,
                  Instant)
  --full          print full JSON record(s)
  --limit <n>     max results to show (default: "20")
  -h, --help      display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary cards search [options] <text...>

Search cards by text. Supports inline filters: r:Rarity, t:Type, k:Keyword
  Examples:
    fab-cli fabrary cards search prism awakener
    fab-cli fabrary cards search r:Majestic prism
    fab-cli fabrary cards search vynnset t:Hero
    fab-cli fabrary cards search vynnset --foiling Cold --set Promos

Options:
  -d, --detail             Show full detail for each card
  -n, --limit <n>          Max results to show
  --foiling <foiling>      Filter by foiling: Cold, Gold, Rainbow
  --treatment <treatment>  Filter by art treatment: 'Alternate Art', 'Full Art',
                           etc.
  --artist <artist>        Filter by artist name (partial match)
  --set <set>              Filter by set name (partial match)
  --spec <hero>            Filter by specialization hero (e.g. Vynnset)
  --subtype <subtype>      Filter by subtype (e.g. Attack, Young, 1H)
  --class <class>          Filter by class (e.g. Runeblade, Ninja)
  --talent <talent>        Filter by talent (e.g. Shadow, Light, Ice)
  --fusion <element>       Filter by fusion (Earth, Ice, Lightning)
  --legal <format>         Filter cards legal in format (e.g. CC, Blitz)
  --pitch <n>              Filter by pitch value (1=red, 2=yellow, 3=blue)
  --cost <n>               Filter by cost value
  --defense <n>            Filter by defense value
  --power <n>              Filter by power value
  -h, --help               display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary cards show [options] <text...>

Show full detail for a specific card (first match)

Options:
  -h, --help  display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary meta [options]

Show hero win rates from the fabrary.net meta results matrix

Options:
  --format <fmt>     Format (cc, sa, blitz, ll, upf) (default: "cc")
  --period <period>  Period: 7d, 30d, 2026-04, or a season slug (default: "30d")
  --hero <id>        Show matchup breakdown for a specific hero
  --show <n>         Max heroes in output (default: 30)
  --list-periods     List all valid period slugs and exit
  -h, --help         display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabrary meta-shift [options]

Compare 7d vs 30d win rates to identify trending heroes

Options:
  --format <fmt>          Format (cc, sa, blitz, ll, upf) (default: "cc")
  --ban <ids>             Comma-separated hero identifiers to treat as
                          banned/removed
  --nerf <ids>            Comma-separated hero identifiers with minor nerfs
                          (~-6% WR)
  --exclude <ids>         Comma-separated hero identifiers to hide from output
  --my-classes <classes>  Comma-separated classes to filter heroes (e.g.
                          guardian,warrior)
  --show <n>              Max heroes in output (default: 20)
  -h, --help              display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabtcg [options] [command]

Official FAB TCG site data (events, organised play)

Options:
  -h, --help                  display help for command

Commands:
  events [options]            Show upcoming organised play events from
                              fabtcg.com
  card [options] [query...]   Official Card Vault (cardvault.fabtcg.com): TRUE
                              text (authoritative per CR 2.0.2), printed text,
                              legality
  coverage [options] <event>  Tournament coverage: standings, hero field,
                              decklists, player path
  help [command]              display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabtcg events [options]

Show upcoming organised play events from fabtcg.com

Options:
  --world-tour     Only Pro Tour, Calling, and World Championship events
  --upcoming       Only future events (after today)
  --format <fmt>   Filter by format (partial match)
  --with-coverage  Only events that have a live coverage page with
                   results/standings
  --year <n>       Fetch events from a specific year (e.g. 2025)
  -h, --help       display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabtcg card [options] [query...]

Official Card Vault (cardvault.fabtcg.com): TRUE text (authoritative per CR
2.0.2), printed text, legality

Options:
  --name <text>        Card name contains
  --text <text>        Rules text contains
  --pitch <n>          Exact pitch value
  --cost <n>           Exact cost value
  --power <n>          Exact power value
  --defense <n>        Exact defense value
  --talent <talent>    Talent (e.g. Ice, Shadow)
  --class <class>      Class (e.g. Illusionist, Bard)
  --subtype <subtype>  Subtype (e.g. Aura, (2H))
  --format <fmt>       Legal in format (e.g. "Classic Constructed")
  --rarity <rarity>    Rarity (e.g. common, majestic)
  --set <code>         Set code (e.g. WTR, MON)
  --artist <name>      Artist name
  -n, --limit <n>      Max results to list (default: "10")
  --list-only          Only list matches; skip the true-text detail fetch
  --json               Raw JSON of the detail record
  -h, --help           display help for command

Usage: fab-cli fabtcg coverage [options] <event>

Tournament coverage: standings, hero field, decklists, player path

Options:
  --round <n>             Show standings for a specific round (number or
                          'final')
  --field                 Show hero field breakdown from latest available
                          standings
  --decklists             List available decklists for the event
  --player <name>         Show decklist for a specific player
  --path <name>           Reconstruct a player's full round-by-round journey
  --search-player <name>  Find a player by partial name match
  -h, --help              display help for command

Usage: fab-cli rules [options] [command]

Official FAB rules documents (CR, TRP, PPG) vendored in third_party/fab-rules

Options:
  -h, --help             display help for command

Commands:
  update-docs [options]  Redownload the vendored rules documents; replace only
                         if validated (size + content sentinel), refresh
                         VERSIONS.txt
  help [command]         display help for command

Usage: fab-cli rules update-docs [options]

Redownload the vendored rules documents; replace only if validated (size +
content sentinel), refresh VERSIONS.txt

Options:
  --commit    Auto-commit third_party/fab-rules when a document actually changed
  -h, --help  display help for command

Usage: fab-cli lore [options] [command]

Flesh & Blood lore from legendarystories.net (fablore submodule)

Options:
  -h, --help                   display help for command

Commands:
  sync [options]               Update the fablore submodule and rebuild the lore
                               index + OKF files
  search [options] <query...>  Search the lore; results link to their
                               legendarystories.net source
  show <key...>                Print a lore document (by path, slug, or title) +
                               its source URL
  list [options]               List lore documents
  help [command]               display help for command

Usage: fab-cli lore sync [options]

Update the fablore submodule and rebuild the lore index + OKF files

Options:
  --no-update  Skip pulling upstream; just rebuild from the current submodule
  --no-okf     Skip writing OKF markdown files (index only)
  -h, --help   display help for command

Usage: fab-cli lore search [options] <query...>

Search the lore; results link to their legendarystories.net source

Options:
  -n, --limit <n>    Max results (default: 8)
  --no-sync          Don't refresh the submodule (offline)
  --force-sync       Refresh upstream now even if recently synced
  --include-archive  Also search archive/ (older, possibly non-canon lore)
  -h, --help         display help for command

Usage: fab-cli lore show [options] <key...>

Print a lore document (by path, slug, or title) + its source URL

Options:
  -h, --help  display help for command

Usage: fab-cli lore list [options]

List lore documents

Options:
  -s, --section <name>  Filter by section (e.g. heroes-of-rathe)
  -q, --filter <text>   Filter by title substring
  --include-archive     Include archive/ (older, possibly non-canon lore)
  -h, --help            display help for command

Usage: fab-cli price-comparison [options] [command]

Compare Flesh & Blood single-card prices across TCGplayer and Cardmarket

Options:
  -h, --help             display help for command

Commands:
  card [options] <name>  Show per-condition prices for a card on every printing,
                         plus cross-marketplace ratio tables
  export [options]       Export the full FAB singles catalog price comparison to
                         CSV files (SPEC-PRICE §9.2)
  help [command]         display help for command

Usage: fab-cli price-comparison card [options] <name>

Show per-condition prices for a card on every printing, plus cross-marketplace
ratio tables

Options:
  --csv [file]          Emit the §9.3 CSV layout instead of tables (stdout, or a
                        file path if given)
  --refresh             Bypass the tcgcsv/Cardmarket/FX disk caches and re-fetch
  --currency <usd|eur>  Common currency ratio tables convert to (default: "usd")
  -h, --help            display help for command

Usage: fab-cli price-comparison export [options]

Export the full FAB singles catalog price comparison to CSV files (SPEC-PRICE
§9.2)

Options:
  --out <dir>           Output directory (default: "./price-comparison/")
  --set <name...>       Filter by tcgcsv group name (case-insensitive,
                        repeatable). Default: full catalog
  --refresh             Bypass the tcgcsv/Cardmarket/FX disk caches and re-fetch
  --currency <usd|eur>  Common currency ratio pages convert to (default: "usd")
  -h, --help            display help for command
